name: atlas-blob-compute-smoke-d2cubic
description: E5 Phase 7d Step 6 — D2 cubic refinement enabled. With tileCount=2 (per Step 4) for headroom + enableD2Cubic=true, the pipeline rebuilds with D2_CUBIC_ENABLED=1 and the cubicFires counter ticks on overshoots in thin-feature bricks. Verifies pipeline rebuild on toggle change works + cubic firing produces no crash + counter accumulates.
